tasks.label: start-frontend-no-interactive
args: set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set CI=true&& npm run start:front

tasks.label: seed-local-users-postgres
args: INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Admin','Wedding','admin@wedding.local','Admin123*','ADMIN') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Juan','Perez','juan.perez@wedding.local','User123*','USER') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; SELECT id, nombre, apellido, correo, rol FROM usuario ORDER BY id;

tasks.label: seed-users-postgres-psql
args: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usuario (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, nombre VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, apellido VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, correo VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255), rol VARCHAR(255)); INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Admin','Wedding','admin@wedding.local','Admin123*','ADMIN') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Juan','Perez','juan.perez@wedding.local','User123*','USER') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; SELECT id, nombre, apellido, correo, rol FROM usuario ORDER BY id;

tasks.label: start-frontend-nx-no-daemon
args: set NX_DAEMON=false&& set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set CI=true&& npx nx serve wedding-web

tasks.label: seed-users-postgres16
args: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usuario (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, nombre VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, apellido VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, correo VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255), rol VARCHAR(255)); INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Admin','Wedding','admin@wedding.local','Admin123*','ADMIN') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Juan','Perez','juan.perez@wedding.local','User123*','USER') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; SELECT id, nombre, apellido, correo, rol FROM usuario ORDER BY id;

tasks.label: seed-users-postgres16-escaped
args: docker exec mi-postgres16 psql -U miusuario -d mibdd -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usuario (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, nombre VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, apellido VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, correo VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255), rol VARCHAR(255)); INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Admin','Wedding','admin@wedding.local','Admin123*','ADMIN') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; INSERT INTO usuario (nombre, apellido, correo, password, rol) VALUES ('Juan','Perez','juan.perez@wedding.local','User123*','USER') ON CONFLICT (correo) DO UPDATE SET nombre=EXCLUDED.nombre, apellido=EXCLUDED.apellido, password=EXCLUDED.password, rol=EXCLUDED.rol; SELECT id, nombre, apellido, correo, rol FROM usuario ORDER BY id;"

tasks.label: start-backend-docker-maven
args: docker run --rm --name wedding-api-local -p 8080:8080 -e DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://host.docker.internal:5432/mibdd -e DB_USERN=miusuario -e DB_PASSWORD=mipassword -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace/apps/wedding-api maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 mvn spring-boot:run

tasks.label: seed-normal-user-via-api
args: $loginBody = @{ nombre='Admin'; password='Admin123*' } | ConvertTo-Json; $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/admin/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $loginBody; $token = $loginResp.token; $userBody = @{ nombre='Juan'; apellido='Perez'; correo='juan.perez@wedding.local'; password='User123*'; rol='USER' } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/usuarios' -Headers @{ 'X-Admin-Token' = $token } -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $userBody | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: repair-nx-local
args: taskkill /F /IM node.exe >nul 2>nul & if exist .nx rmdir /s /q .nx & npm install

tasks.label: restart-backend-docker
args: docker rm -f wedding-api-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-api-local -p 8080:8080 -e DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://host.docker.internal:5432/mibdd -e DB_USERN=miusuario -e DB_PASSWORD=mipassword -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace/apps/wedding-api maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 mvn spring-boot:run

tasks.label: start-frontend-after-repair
args: set NX_DAEMON=false&& set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set CI=true&& npm run start:front

tasks.label: verify-users-api
args: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/admin/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"nombre\":\"Admin\",\"password\":\"Admin123*\"}" > admin_login_tmp.json && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$token=(Get-Content admin_login_tmp.json | ConvertFrom-Json).token; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/usuarios' -Headers @{ 'X-Admin-Token'=$token } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5"

tasks.label: check-local-ports
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080,5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify-users-db-direct
args: SELECT id, nombre, apellido, correo, rol FROM usuario ORDER BY id;

tasks.label: test-confirmacion-api-local
args: $body = @{ nombre='Juan'; apellido='Perez'; alergias='Prueba local'; acompanante=$true } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/confirmacion' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: verify-confirmacion-db-local
args: SELECT c.id, u.nombre, u.apellido, c.acompanante, c.alergias, c.fecha_confirmacion FROM confirmacion c JOIN usuario u ON u.id = c.usuario_id ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 5;

tasks.label: check-running-before-restart
args: Write-Host '--- PORTS ---'; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080,5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host '--- DOCKER ---'; docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}"

tasks.label: stop-front-back-local
args: $ports = 4200,8080; foreach ($p in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $ids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($id in $ids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Stopped PID $id on port $p" } catch {} } } }; docker rm -f wedding-api-local 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Stopped backend container wedding-api-local if existed.'

tasks.label: start-backend-local-docker
args: docker run --rm --name wedding-api-local -p 8080:8080 -e DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://host.docker.internal:5432/mibdd -e DB_USERN=miusuario -e DB_PASSWORD=mipassword -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace/apps/wedding-api maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 mvn spring-boot:run

tasks.label: start-frontend-local-nx
args: set NX_DAEMON=false&& set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set CI=true&& node node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js serve wedding-web

tasks.label: check-ports-after-restart
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080,5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: start-docker-desktop
args: $path = 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; if (Test-Path $path) { Start-Process $path; Write-Host 'Docker Desktop started.' } else { Write-Host 'Docker Desktop not found.'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: start-docker-desktop-cmd
args: if exist "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe" (start "" "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe" && echo Docker Desktop launched) else (echo Docker Desktop not found && exit /b 1)

tasks.label: start-backend-docker-fresh
args: docker rm -f wedding-api-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-api-local -p 8080:8080 -e DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://host.docker.internal:5432/mibdd -e DB_USERN=miusuario -e DB_PASSWORD=mipassword -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace/apps/wedding-api maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 mvn spring-boot:run

tasks.label: start-frontend-nx-fresh
args: set NX_DAEMON=false&& set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set CI=true&& node node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js serve wedding-web

tasks.label: ports-check-final
args: $ports = 4200,8080,5432; foreach ($p in $ports) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($c) { "PORT $p LISTEN" } else { "PORT $p NOT_LISTEN" } }

tasks.label: start-backend-local-now
args: docker rm -f wedding-api-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-api-local -p 8080:8080 -e DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://host.docker.internal:5432/mibdd -e DB_USERN=miusuario -e DB_PASSWORD=mipassword -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace/apps/wedding-api maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 mvn spring-boot:run

tasks.label: start-frontend-local-now
args: set NX_DAEMON=false&& set NX_INTERACTIVE=false&& set NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false&& set CI=true&& node node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js serve wedding-web

tasks.label: verify-ports-up-now
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080,5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: start-frontend-docker-node
args: docker rm -f wedding-web-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-web-local -p 4200:4200 -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace node:20-bullseye sh -lc "npm install && npx nx serve wedding-web --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200"

tasks.label: verify-ports-final-now
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080,5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify-port-4200-only
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: start-frontend-docker-node-retry
args: docker rm -f wedding-web-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-web-local -p 4200:4200 -v %cd%:/workspace -w /workspace node:20-bullseye sh -lc "npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx nx serve wedding-web --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200"

tasks.label: start-frontend-docker-fixed
args: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx nx serve wedding-web --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200

tasks.label: build-frontend-in-docker
args: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx nx build wedding-web --configuration=production

tasks.label: build-frontend-in-docker-devdeps
args: npm install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && node node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js build wedding-web --configuration=production

tasks.label: serve-new-dist-4200
args: for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('netstat -ano ^| findstr :4200 ^| findstr LISTENING') do taskkill /F /PID %a >nul 2>nul & docker rm -f wedding-web-local >nul 2>nul & docker run --rm --name wedding-web-local -p 4200:3000 -v C:\Users\6003369\Desktop\Proyecto_TS\Dino\proyect_Dino\dist\apps\wedding-web:/app -w /app node:20-bullseye bash -lc "npx serve -s . -l 3000"

tasks.label: reinstall-nx-clean
args: if exist .nx rmdir /s /q .nx && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && if exist package-lock.json del /f /q package-lock.json && npm install

tasks.label: verify-nx-services-up
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200,8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: check-back-port-8080
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize

args: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize
